name: UX Layer Grey + Highlighter
philosophy: Dark grey = UX structure. Highlighter = only foreground accent. Dotted lines = UX annotation language. Layer mark = product identity. 3D meerkat = personality.

accent.name: Highlighter
accent.semantics: UX markup, active flow path, CTAs — not luxury gold
usage: Active dashed borders on primary UX paths
UX label highlights on critical annotations

logo.mark: Layer mark — interlocking wireframe cards (leaf / L / UX planes)
logo.rule: Mascot never in logo lockup, favicon, or navbar

mascot.colors: Tan fur, charcoal patches, highlighter chest chevron
mascot.use: Landing sections, empty states, 404, social — not in logo

annotation.labelStyle: uppercase mono — PERSONA, FLOW, EDGE CASE, PRIMARY PATH
